name: Texas Mopping Sauce for Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Simmer the mixture for at least 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Allow the sauce to cool completely before transferring it to a tightly covered jar and storing it in the refrigerator.
4. Before using, heat the sauce until it reaches your desired serving temperature.
This sauce is very spicy and some people find it too strong for poultry; however, I believe it enhances the flavor of meat dishes. The coarser the pepper is ground, the better the sauce will be. When used on country-style pork ribs, this sauce can make a significant impact.
